seo.title: About Gastro Master — Digital Solutions for Your Restaurant
seo.description: Discover our story. A team of 30+ members across 16 German states, providing personal guidance. 0% commission, 24/7 support in German.

hero.text: We help restaurateurs become digitally independent. Personal, fair, and with a team that truly knows you.

story.heading: Digital power for the restaurant industry. That's our mission.

block1.p1: Sanjaya, our founder and IT expert, recognized the potential: With 15 years of IT experience, he developed an ordering system that works like major delivery platforms. But without excessive commissions.
block1.p2: The motto was clear: Fair collaboration with restaurateurs. No fine print, no hidden fees. A system that works for you.
block1.img1Alt: René Ebert advising a restaurateur on a laptop

block2.p1: René Ebert joined, inspired by his USA experiences and the growing need for digitalization. Together, they founded Gastro Master.
block2.p2: Today we offer you a comprehensive portfolio: [Apps](/produkte/app), [Order shops](/produkte/webshop), [POS systems](/produkte/kassensystem), and [Payment processing](/produkte/transaktionsumlage). Everything developed to help you work more efficiently, customer-oriented, and successfully.
block2.img2Alt: René Ebert and restaurateur sealing partnership with a handshake

location.heading: Our location: Usingen near Frankfurt
location.subtitle: This is where Gastro Master was born. With passion for the restaurant industry.
location.imgAlt: Gastro Master location Usingen near Frankfurt, Hesse
location.p1: Our location is in Usingen near Frankfurt. But our area of operation extends across the entire country. With customers in all 16 federal states, we carry out projects nationwide and understand the diverse requirements of the restaurant industry in every region.
location.p2: Would you like to get to know us? We'd love that. Visit us in Usingen for a personal meeting — or we'll talk by phone or video call. Whatever suits you best. Consultation at eye level means you have the choice.

timeline.heading: 5 Years of Momentum
timeline.subtitle: From the first customer to our own payment system – we're building the future of the restaurant industry.
timeline.footer: We are forward-thinking, flexible, and build software that truly moves restaurateurs forward.

milestones.title: Day One & Founding
milestones.text: The foundation for a new era of restaurant digitalization

team.heading:
Real people.
Real guidance.
team.subtitle: Not an anonymous software provider – but a team of 30+ members that personally guides you.

founders.name: René Ebert
founders.bio: After his Bachelor's in International Business Management, he chose the entrepreneurial path. His focus is on growth, sales, and strategic market development.

founders.name: Sanjaya Pattiyage
founders.bio: Longtime IT specialist with experience in technology and leadership roles at internationally leading companies like Procter & Gamble. Focus on product, systems, and scalable technology.

members.name: Salvatore Anzaldi
members.bio: Years of sales experience. Previously in the sale of mechanical luxury watches at a leading online provider like CHRONEXT – and knows that every single component counts.

members.name: Andrej Krutsch
members.bio: Previously in leading positions in the food retail sector, including at Rewe. Brings solid experience in customer service and operational organization.

members.name: Mohammad Motakalemi
members.bio: A former restaurateur who found his way to the team through his own positive experience as a customer. He knows the challenges of the industry firsthand.

languages.heading: Consultation at eye level. In your language.
languages.subtitle: Our consultation is personal, direct, and linguistically close to your everyday life. We speak your language – so you feel understood from the very start.

values.heading: What we believe in
values.subtitle: Our core values are the foundation for everything we do.

items.title: Fair
items.text: 0% commission, transparent pricing. You don't pay for referrals. You pay for real solutions.

items.title: Personal
items.text: Direct contact with our 30+ team. No waiting queues, no anonymous hotline.

items.title: Innovation
items.text: Constantly new solutions: POS system, payment processing, self-service. We innovate with you.

items.title: Reliable
items.text: 24/7 support. 5 years of success. We're here when you need us.

items.title: Fair commission model
items.text: 0% instead of 25-30% on delivery platforms. We don't earn from your commissions. We earn from the success of your restaurant.

items.title: German software, direct support
items.text: Developed in Germany. Support in German. No distant servers, no anonymous support. We're close to you.

items.title: Flexible solutions
items.text: From web apps to online shops to your own POS system. You choose what you need. And can expand at any time.

items.title: We grow with you
items.text: From 0 to 800+ restaurants. We know the challenges of every size. Whether single operation or chain.

items.name: Marco Greco
items.quote: With Gastro Master, we completely digitalized our ordering processes.

items.name: Ha Lim Lee
items.quote: The support is incredible. We truly feel personally cared for.

items.name: Georgios Madatsidis
items.quote: The best value for money on the market. No hidden fees.

items.name: Milad Ismail
items.quote: I receive the money in my account instantly with every order. Everything at Gastro Master is flexible.

items.name: Sven Heinrich
items.quote: You get fast and great WhatsApp support here and the ability to structure your business.

steps.title: Free Consultation
steps.text: We get to know your restaurant. What do you need? What are your requirements? Together we find the right solution.

steps.title: Configure Solution
steps.text: You decide what you need. Online shop, app, POS system, everything together. We show you the options, you choose.

steps.title: Setup & Training
steps.text: We set everything up technically. Training for your team, in person or online. You'll be ready at the end.

steps.title: Go Live
steps.text: Your restaurant is live. Your new systems are working. Your guests can already order.

steps.title: 24/7 Support
steps.text: We're here. Questions? Problems? New requirements? Our team supports you around the clock in German.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Gastro Master.

items.q: How long does the setup take?
items.a: That depends on the solution. On average about 2 weeks, depending on which systems you implement. Our team guides you through every step. For faster implementation, [contact us for a free consultation](/kontakt). We'll find the best solution for your restaurant.

items.q: Are there hidden fees or commissions?
items.a: No. Absolutely not. With Gastro Master, you pay 0% commission. Unlike major delivery platforms that charge 25-30%. All costs are transparent. Check out our [pricing overview](/preise). There you'll see exactly what to expect.

items.q: Can I add more solutions later?
items.a: Yes, absolute flexibility. You can start with a [website](/produkte/webseite) and later add an [order shop](/produkte/webshop) or a [POS system](/produkte/kassensystem). Changeable at any time. You decide what you need.

items.q: How is your support? Am I just a number?
items.a: No. Our team of 30+ members provides personal 24/7 support in German. No waiting queues, no automated systems. You speak with real people who understand your restaurant.

items.q: Is our restaurant too far from Usingen?
items.a: No. While we're based in Usingen near Frankfurt, we work with customers in all 16 federal states. No matter where your restaurant is, our support is available nationwide. Visit us in person or use phone and video calls. [Book your free consultation now](/kontakt).

cta.text: Get free advice from our team. Personal, non-binding, and in your language.

schema.orgDescription: Digital solutions for the restaurant industry: ordering system, POS system, app, and website. 0% commission, personal support.
